subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God, the Mighty, the Beautiful, unto all that dwell in the heavens and on earth, that they may witness His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله العزیز الجمیل الی من فی السموات و الارضین لعل یشهدن آیاته و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
